status_legend.blocked: Dang bi chan, can user quyet dinh
status_legend.done: Da hoan thanh va co evidence

global_rules: Chi lam P0 Critical cho den khi demo flow end-to-end pass.
Moi task phai co test hoac test plan truoc khi code.
Moi feature phai di theo vertical slice: backend, frontend, test, manual validation.
Neu business rule thieu hoac mau thuan, dung lai va hoi user.
Khong hardcode secrets, Supabase keys, AI provider keys, hoac backend URL.
User la nguoi testing cuoi cung, vi vay moi feature phai co manual validation steps ro rang.
p1_locked_until_all_p0_done: US-035 Audit events day du hon
p2_forbidden_in_mvp: GraphRAG hoac multimodal RAG nang cao
LMS features: gradebook, diem danh, bai nop

features.name: Project setup, env baseline, verification
features.description: Khoi tao nen tang frontend/backend dung stack va co duong verification restartable.
features.business_goal: Khoi tao nen tang frontend/backend dung stack va co duong verification restartable.

backend: Tao backend FastAPI bang uv, chay port 3000, base path /api/v1.
Tao health endpoint toi thieu duoi /api/v1.
frontend: Tao frontend Vite React TypeScript/TSX bang pnpm.
Tao API client doc VITE_BACKEND_URL tu env.
tests: Backend health endpoint test.
Frontend typecheck/build smoke test.
Test hoac script guard dam bao frontend khong hardcode localhost:3000/api/v1.
manual_validation: Chay backend tai http://localhost:3000/api/v1/health.
Chay frontend va xac nhan UI goi API qua VITE_BACKEND_URL.
Chay ./init.sh thanh cong.

acceptance_criteria: .env.example co VITE_BACKEND_URL va cac key backend can thiet.

features.name: Auth, demo accounts, role routing
features.description: Admin, Teacher, Student dang nhap va chi vao dung workspace/quyen.
features.business_goal: Admin, Teacher, Student dang nhap va chi vao dung workspace/quyen.

backend: Auth/demo account flow co role admin, teacher, student.
Backend role check cho endpoint quan trong.
frontend: Login UI va redirect theo role.
An action ngoai quyen tren dashboard.
tests: Role permission test cho admin/teacher/student.
Backend reject role sai o endpoint bao ve.
manual_validation: Dang nhap demo Admin vao Admin Dashboard.
Dang nhap demo Teacher vao Teacher Dashboard.
Dang nhap demo Student vao Student Dashboard.
Thu truy cap route/API sai role va xac nhan bi chan.

acceptance_criteria: Co demo Admin, Teacher, Student account.
Backend kiem tra role o API quan trong.

features.name: Course, class profile, student membership
features.description: Teacher tao course/class va add Student co san vao class de khoa access theo membership.
features.business_goal: Teacher tao course/class va add Student co san vao class de khoa access theo membership.

backend: CRUD toi thieu cho courses/classes theo teacher ownership.
Endpoint add Student co san vao class.
Membership check cho class_students.
frontend: Teacher UI tao/xem course.
Teacher UI tao class profile.
Teacher UI chon Student co san va add vao class.
tests: Teacher chi thay course/class cua minh.
Class membership test: Student duoc add thay class, Student khac khong thay.
Student level chi chap nhan weak, average, strong.
manual_validation: Teacher tao course Introduction to Artificial Intelligence.
Teacher tao class KTPM-K18 voi level Average, 12 sessions, 90 phut.
Teacher add Student demo vao class.
Student demo thay class; Student khac khong thay.

acceptance_criteria: Student level gom weak, average, strong.

features.name: Knowledge base source selection and RAG retrieval
features.description: Teacher chon documents da pre-ingest va backend retrieve chunks lien quan tu Supabase/pgvector.
features.business_goal: Teacher chon documents da pre-ingest va backend retrieve chunks lien quan tu Supabase/pgvector.

backend: Model/API documents va document_chunks tu Supabase.
RetrievalService nhan topic/session va selected_document_ids, tra top-k chunks.
Luu retrieved context vao generation job.
frontend: Knowledge source picker hien title, status, chunk count.
Chi cho chon completed documents.
Warning neu chua chon document.
tests: RAG retrieval tra chunks dung selected documents.
Chunk response co document_title, page_number neu co, excerpt.
Dam bao khong gui toan bo PDF/document vao LLM.
manual_validation: Mo Teacher source picker va chi chon completed documents.
Generate retrieval cho topic Transformer Architecture.
Xem top-k chunks va citations/source evidence.

acceptance_criteria: Retrieval chay tren DB va tra citations toi thieu.

features.name: AI provider abstraction and course outline generation
features.description: Teacher generate outline theo course/class/documents, output duoc validate schema va edit duoc.
features.business_goal: Teacher generate outline theo course/class/documents, output duoc validate schema va edit duoc.

backend: AIProvider abstraction: generate_structured, generate_text, embed_text.
Provider va API key doc tu .env.
Generate outline dung session_count va class profile.
Validate schema truoc khi luu.
frontend: UI generate outline tu course/class/source documents.
UI review/edit outline sessions.
Teacher chon mot session de generate lesson.
tests: AI output schema validation cho outline.
Outline dung session_count.
Provider config khong hardcode trong route/controller.
manual_validation: Teacher generate outline cho class KTPM-K18.
Xac nhan co 12 sessions, objectives, key topics, activities, exercises.
Edit mot session title/content va luu lai.

acceptance_criteria: Teacher edit outline co ban duoc.

features.name: Lesson blocks, required block types, citations, warnings
features.description: AI tao lesson theo blocks co citations; block thieu grounding co warning ro.
features.business_goal: AI tao lesson theo blocks co citations; block thieu grounding co warning ro.

backend: Generate lesson blocks tu outline session va retrieved chunks.
Validate lesson block schema.
Luu lesson thanh blocks, khong luu text blob lon.
Citation fields: document_title, page_number, excerpt, chunk_id, confidence.
frontend: Hien block list va citation/warning gan tung block.
Hien warning cho block thieu citation.
tests: Lesson schema validation.
Block status mac dinh needs_review.
Block thieu citation tao warning dung text.
Required demo block types co toi thieu learning_objectives, concept_explanation, analogy_or_example, quiz, slide.
manual_validation: Teacher generate lesson cho session Transformer Architecture.
Xem blocks va citations.
Xac nhan block thieu citation co warning: Noi dung nay chua duoc grounding day du tu tai lieu nguon.

acceptance_criteria: Moi block co type, title, content, order_index, status.
Citations hien trong Teacher Lesson Studio va Admin Review.
Teacher co the approve_with_warning cho block thieu citation.

features.name: Teacher Lesson Studio review flow
features.description: Teacher review lesson theo block, edit/regenerate/approve va submit cho Admin.
features.business_goal: Teacher review lesson theo block, edit/regenerate/approve va submit cho Admin.

backend: Endpoints edit/save block, regenerate one block, approve, approve_with_warning, reject.
Lesson status transition den submitted_for_admin_review.
Chan submit neu con block chinh chua review.
frontend: Lesson Studio: block list, center content, right citation panel.
Controls edit/save/regenerate/approve/approve_with_warning/reject/submit.
Review progress, loading, empty, error state.
tests: Lesson status transition tests.
Regenerate mot block khong doi block khac.
Submit bi chan khi block chinh chua review.
Teacher ownership check.
manual_validation: Edit mot block va xac nhan saved state.
Regenerate mot block va xac nhan block khac giu nguyen.
Approve/approve_with_warning/reject va xem progress.
Submit lesson va thay trong Admin queue.

acceptance_criteria: Lesson status doi thanh submitted_for_admin_review khi submit hop le.

features.name: Admin moderation and publish flow
features.description: Admin review lesson submitted, xem citations/warnings, publish hoac request changes.
features.business_goal: Admin review lesson submitted, xem citations/warnings, publish hoac request changes.

backend: Admin review queue endpoint.
Approve_and_publish status transition sang published.
Request_changes kem feedback status changes_requested.
Admin khong co endpoint sua truc tiep lesson content.
frontend: Admin Dashboard review queue.
Admin review screen hien blocks/citations/warnings/teacher approval status.
Approve & Publish va Request Changes UI.
tests: Admin publish flow test.
Non-admin bi chan khoi admin endpoints.
Request changes khong hien lesson cho Student.
Published lesson hien voi Student dung class.
manual_validation: Admin login, mo review queue.
Xem warning count, citations, blocks.
Approve & Publish mot lesson.
Request changes mot lesson khac va Teacher thay feedback.

acceptance_criteria: Admin request changes kem feedback duoc.
Admin khong sua truc tiep content.

features.name: Student class-based published lesson access
features.description: Student chi xem published lessons thuoc class minh duoc add vao.
features.business_goal: Student chi xem published lessons thuoc class minh duoc add vao.

backend: Student classes endpoint theo membership.
Student lessons endpoint chi tra published va dung class.
Direct URL permission check.
frontend: Student Dashboard hien class membership.
Lesson list chi hien published lessons.
Reading view khong co edit/regenerate/approve controls.
tests: Student access restriction test.
Student khong thuoc class bi 403/404 khi direct URL.
Draft/submitted/rejected lessons bi an.
manual_validation: Student demo thay class KTPM-K18 va lesson published.
Student khac khong thay class/lesson.
Paste direct URL lesson ngoai class va xac nhan bi chan.
Reading view khong co teacher/admin controls.

acceptance_criteria: Student thay class minh duoc add.
Direct URL access van kiem tra quyen.

features.name: Web Presentation and PDF export
features.description: Teacher/Student mo presentation va export PDF co ban cho lesson duoc phep xem.
features.business_goal: Teacher/Student mo presentation va export PDF co ban cho lesson duoc phep xem.

backend: Permission check cho presentation/export endpoints neu co backend route.
Luu export record toi thieu neu can theo PRD.
frontend: Presentation mode co next/previous, fullscreen, keyboard navigation, progress indicator.
PDF export bang print layout/browser print neu du validate MVP.
Markdown/PPTX disabled hoac coming soon neu chua lam.
tests: Presentation permission check.
PDF export permission check.
Export khong crash app khi co loi.
manual_validation: Teacher preview presentation lesson draft co trang thai ro.
Student mo presentation cua published lesson thuoc class.
Dung phim next/previous va fullscreen.
Bam Export PDF va xac nhan output/print layout doc duoc.

acceptance_criteria: Presentation layout de doc tren may chieu.
Student chi export lesson minh co quyen xem.

features.name: UX states, demo seed, deployment readiness
features.description: Hoan thien flow demo end-to-end voi UI hien dai, states ro rang va deploy on dinh.
features.business_goal: Hoan thien flow demo end-to-end voi UI hien dai, states ro rang va deploy on dinh.

backend: Seed/demo data hoac script tai lieu hoa cho Admin/Teacher/Student, course/class demo va KB.
Health/readiness checks phu hop deploy.
frontend: Sidebar, card layout, Lesson Studio, citation panel, presentation projector-friendly.
Loading/empty/error states va toast success/error cho flow chinh.
tests: E2E smoke test hoac manual scripted test cho demo flow day du.
Check khong co API key trong frontend bundle/source.
Regression check cho role/class access.
manual_validation: Teacher login -> create/open course demo -> create/open class KTPM-K18 -> add Student demo.
Select knowledge source -> generate outline -> generate lesson blocks -> view citations.
Edit/regenerate/approve blocks -> submit to Admin.
Admin review -> approve & publish.
Student view class -> open published lesson -> presentation -> export PDF.

acceptance_criteria: UI hien dai, ro rang, khong roi.
Demo flow acceptance trong USER_STORIES_MVP.md pass.
